scripts.inspector: npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/inspector -e FOUNDRY_USE_MOCK=1 -- pnpm exec tsx src/index.ts
scripts.inspector:api: npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/inspector -e FOUNDRY_USE_MOCK=0 -e FOUNDRY_API_TOKEN="${FOUNDRY_API_TOKEN:?Set FOUNDRY_API_TOKEN for live Foundry API}" -- pnpm exec tsx src/index.ts
